## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings (`npm run lint -- --max-warnings 0`)
- [ ] No new Stylelint warnings (`npm run lint:css`)
- [ ] TypeScript types are valid (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Design tokens used (no hardcoded colors/sizes/weights)
- [ ] No arbitrary Tailwind values (e.g., `w-[123px]`)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (keyboard nav, ARIA labels, color contrast)
- [ ] Analytics events added if applicable
